textByHashes.347688d5124a43ba294870d789d11d91281b1221: Ah, yes, I remember this name now. Harrallak has spoken of him before.
textByHashes.79aae8c950cb85c3d62f97242aa504de76d5d92b: A chance to put down evil is a chance I will never refuse! You have my support.
textByHashes.c78bcd40e16a61ed3c1b124461ca1809670211b7: I will need to make arrangements with Laidee so we have someone to take care of the Guild. Once that is done, I will join you.
textByHashes.eb0bbc65a1db8e1e52c38c040515e699794b467b: I have already agreed to join your cause. I just need to make arrangements so we have someone to take care of the Guild while I'm gone.
textByHashes.67925e40f791d076e26f98e5fb4c47da32385ee0: When are we going to have this fight? I tire of waiting.
textByHashes.b923b1f76b6bad37d3c901c94d66b2eb07b2c4ee: Good. This Mahjarrat will soon know pain!
textByHashes.af1e9a1db71ff6ffdc7a371ccbb47f442aad05e6: This here is the Warrior's Guild, a place where the strong may train. I'm the one who decides if you are allowed in or not.
textByHashes.16b60c3363bc628107eb1619add0de9191b7653d: Yes you are. Welcome to the Warrior's Guild!
textByHashes.0ccd0e69cd844091d3b58bb53497826cbf4c17e7: You may not enter the Warrior's Guild as you are right now.
textByHashes.2820ff036d46b09b593fc181dc173fa5f32a99b1: While you may consider yourself a warrior, I do not.
textByHashes.c1318587f6983ef58c10b04c9811f6ee390ec800: Go away and train small one. I do not take bribes.
textByHashes.d6e4f544d25f319fa4ac33cb5f7da58b8e372d87: The Warrior's Guild has a code of honour, a code that I respect. Move along.
textByHashes.0e0c272f20fe17430de1c6867a957bdde48696bb: Combat Achievements are a set of tasks for all adventurers to try and accomplish. They range from simple missions to kill various creatures, to challenges that will push you to your limits.
textByHashes.f38b39bc326a93052bf5de801a4e20bf131b63a6: The purpose of these tasks is for you to grow and improve, experience all that Gielinor has to offer, and become stronger in the process.
textByHashes.9e174830b36e57119649248a4085d0f3f6c70834: Is this something that sounds interesting to you?
textByHashes.1126b171d0808970900adc4c57dc9ce78697ed13: Combat Achievements are broken down into six tiers: Easy, Medium, Hard, Elite, Master and Grandmaster.
textByHashes.c50926dc5304fdf45cff50edc380bb4449d66a1c: Each of these tiers is progressively harder than the last, and to earn any rewards from the latter tiers, the prior tiers must be completed.
textByHashes.e7273781e23f231bd1cf916496dbe2724f4755ad: To complete a tier you will need to conquer every task within it.
textByHashes.7b7131637c55f43241e1c27f463bd6e7ad068bb5: I'd recommend you go kill some monsters. Come back to me when you've completed a tier or two. I'll reward you for your efforts.
textByHashes.b1f4ce484ae62601713a149008c0b74fd9bf5b9b: Your gear is adequate, I'm impressed.
textByHashes.5630362ff9ee844c5b3e79208bb6579833ed8495: Hey, I have something for you but you don't have any space for it!
textByHashes.1fef27fa020fce0951f78e243c6f6f3af30f063f: Oh, how have you been getting on?
textByHashes.c40381bb3acefe8de3c4e5bca10d0d9e5fde7637: I can see that. Nice job. You'll be expecting your easy rewards?
textByHashes.78323fd4626fb0ea9ecbd4ae6e4aae31b83b19f6: You need at least 2 inventory spaces. Make some space and come back.
textByHashes.922aab487925ecd822b5d7d811714d0a9179116b: There you go. I've provided you with the most basic of our ancient sword hilts. You'll also have an easier time obtaining easy clues, increased max quantities offered when given boss Slayer tasks, bonus tokens from the
textByHashes.eb5535b6014e4ce2ff2589bd464f3043cbb92b3f: Warrior guild and an extra commendation point from each Pest Control game.
textByHashes.8608976a1c13c6b1f6dcbd0ed724d46b2b89b4f3: I can see that. Nice job. You'll be expecting your medium rewards?
textByHashes.d0b43d94c95e16f82ad999725d93b72c039a55af: There you go. I've provided you with one of our more modest ancient sword hilts. You'll also have an easier time obtaining medium clues, increased max quantities offered when given boss Slayer tasks, bonus tokens
textByHashes.85ff210abb68eacd603997f86d9f9bd3678261f0: from the Warrior guild and two extra commendation points from each Pest Control game. Additionally, equipping one of my sword hilts at the Barrows will prevent your prayer points from being drained and
textByHashes.54d8a5db5aea753b49621c7028657a8e88c77fc9: your Dwarf multicannon can hold five extra cannonballs.
textByHashes.b5edefceb1676975e1b997199499a782c52cf353: I can see that. Nice job. You'll be expecting your hard rewards?
textByHashes.7bd659abc26e942505001c75a66384e59b50bb67: There you go. I've provided you with one of our sturdier ancient sword hilts. You'll also have an easier time obtaining hard clues and have increased max quantities offered when given boss Slayer tasks. You will
textByHashes.086ed30527d94919994c8347030222abe22cc950: also have to kill fewer God Wars minions to access the generals, get more common ecumenical keys, gain access to our most expensive private God Wars rooms, receive a 50% discount on imbue rewards from the
textByHashes.6783d01afe8730f8126af355842c586b076a24cf: Nightmare Zone and Soul Wars, and gain three extra commendation points from each Pest Control game. Lastly, your Dwarf multicannon can hold 15 extra cannonballs.
textByHashes.18aad029329aa077b7228c9016f82ed04b29c015: I can see that. Nice job. You'll be expecting your elite rewards?
textByHashes.bc9b24edf675befe13168c5dd66ffc95fae6ae68: There you go. I've provided you with one of our fancier ancient sword hilts. You'll also have an easier time obtaining elite clues, have increased max quantities offered when given boss Slayer tasks and have a higher
textByHashes.ea85324a5facbce1fc0eab4e46c22997577d9a17: chance of superior slayer creatures appearing. Plus, you'll have to kill even fewer God Wars minions to access the generals, receive even more common ecumenical keys and access to cheaper private God
textByHashes.c2e9258bf943ec0f4de343be041bc7fde20be287: Wars rooms. Furthermore, your Dwarf multicannon can hold 30 extra cannonballs and your Bracelets of slaughter or Expeditious bracelets will have a chance to fully recharge instead of breaking! I can also customize
textByHashes.13e5d05c7198322d0c9153b009603a514b60105e: I can see that. You are clearly a very experienced adventurer. You'll be expecting your master rewards?
textByHashes.390da91916edf2816a1662dbf9360a4d8ff79ce7: There you go. I've provided you with one of our most prestigious ancient sword hilts, along with my cherished lucky penny! You'll also have increased max quantities offered when given boss Slayer tasks, including the
textByHashes.96179f8c5eef10f90f9f2c2cf0ee82a2aad674dc: deadly TzHaar creatures, and have to kill even fewer God Wars minions to access the generals. Again, you'll get even more common ecumenical keys and access to even cheaper private God Wars rooms. Furthermore,
textByHashes.02c09cf4e147e1433d5187b47e0f7dda213dbc56: any Thralls you resurrect will last 100% longer. I can also customize your Slayer helmet even more.
textByHashes.dc6a06448f864991fb895d21a3e839a7b8023bcb: You have come very far. You have earned these rewards.
textByHashes.c080ae322d689731bd050ce2c85d8f5bd5bf794d: There you go. I've provided you with our most prestigious ancient sword hilt. You'll also have increased max quantities offered when given boss Slayer tasks, including the deadly TzHaar creatures, and have to kill
textByHashes.0c870102395bba276eac1ec70f105a1618242d5c: even fewer God Wars minions to access the generals. Plus of course, you'll get even more common ecumenical keys and access to even cheaper private God Wars rooms. And yes, I can also customize your
textByHashes.45ef33df00a49c4c3a1c4b601acd498926475371: I do wonder what you will do now. Good luck, adventurer.
textByHashes.09646b5a432befd0a82a9a0597ab0fed9cbe6269: Ghommal welcome you to Warrior Guild!
textByHashes.2f5d2e9d51dfce77fba81984347a6ce6154c9c9a: You not pass. You too weedy.
textByHashes.5fb97ec1e739e2df04f6472fb81b8626241f0685: Heehee... he say he warrior... I not heard that one for... at leas' 5 minutes!
textByHashes.137593ea24e38176fcd9b607210a814ed619c0fe: Heehee... she say he warrior... I not heard that one for... at leas' 5 minutes!
textByHashes.3e7393ac4f4ff58d3ea99257059fa903df5129c5: Heehee... he say she warrior... I not heard that one for... at leas' 5 minutes!
textByHashes.bec99c2531bd8c1b48f111300531798bb4e82c47: Heehee... she say she warrior... I not heard that one for... at leas' 5 minutes!
textByHashes.f53b11651f2fd7b1014abebfc8265ad21ab2c4f2: No! You is not a strong warrior, you not enter till you bigger. Ghommal does not take bribes.
textByHashes.83417c5192ab27323eab616074135f8eaa8e6bc2: Ghommal stick to Warrior's Code of Honour. When you a bigger, stronger warrior, you come back.
textByHashes.d0ef9772098a5df43e20b4265fec01c870d7a51c: Your gear so strong. Me impressed.
